leadText: Fire (ファイア or ファイヤー) has several referrals: The Fire type, one of the eighteen types that a Pokémon can have. The Fire type in the TCG, represented by . The Japanese name of Moltres. A fan-coined name for Red. Fire Deck (TCG), a theme Half Deck from Pokémon Play It!, specializing in Fire Pokémon. FireRed, referring to the Pokémon game, Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen.
